changeSet.author: quy.dang
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts ( id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL, roles JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, status VARCHAR(50), email_verified_at TIMESTAMPTZ, profile_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts;
